title: Gob's Armory
body:
## **Description:**
This mod adds powerful endgame weapons into the game that are highly configurable!

Many weapons are planned to be added

As of now this mod adds 2 new weapons

Malicious Scythe:
![Malicious Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16f2f3969f122e2ffdcf415c5db9074f78050fe3.gif)

Cybernetic Cleaver:
![Cybernetic Cleaver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4156e0e453ab623831c842d9b3fabea5c122c588.gif)

Weapon Descriptions:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Malicious Scythe - Deals large aoe damage. After 8 fully charged hits, deals increased damage and increases the aoe even larger for the 8th hit.

- Cybernetic Cleaver - Has a chance to inflict a new effect that deals 2.5% of the hit entities maximum health every half a second, this effect can stack up to 3 times and the duration of the effect can be between 3 - 6 seconds

</details>
